case_title: CACH, LLC VS. CHRISTIAN ACOSTA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100014125) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, CHRISTIAN DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-03-2017
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100014125) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: COSTS (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033) AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 100014125) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025842), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED FEB-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-03-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, CHRISTIAN

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $245.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100014125) AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, CHRISTIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACOSTA, CHRISTIAN $3,103.70 PRINCIPAL, $245.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,349.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100014125)
